title: Climate Home News
description: Climate change news, analysis, commentary, video and podcasts focused on developments in global climate politics

items.title: Gulf oil and gas crisis sparks calls for renewable investment
items.description:

items.title: US set to exit UN climate convention in February 2027
items.description:

items.title: Middle East crisis increases Southeast Asia’s coal risk
items.description:

items.title: EU carbon credits could supercharge world’s clean cooking push, France says
items.description:

items.title: Explainer: Will AI data centres make or break the energy transition?
items.description:

items.title: Africa’s mineral wealth can make it an architect of a more just energy transition

items.title: Uganda cites contentious IEA fossil fuel scenario backed by Trump administration

items.title: Curbing methane is the fastest way to slow warming – but we’re off the pace

items.title: There is hope for Venezuela’s future – and it isn’t based on oil

items.title: Rush for critical minerals tests Europe’s resolve to protect nature

items.title: As Louisiana bets big on ‘blue ammonia’, communities brace for air pollution
